passives.name: Soulrend
passives.effects: Damaging an enemy champion with a basic attack or [[ability damage]] deals {{as|125 {{as|(+ 15% AP)}} '''bonus''' magic damage|magic damage}} and grants you {{as|40% '''bonus''' movement speed}} for {{fd|1.5}} seconds, with the duration extending on subsequent triggers (10 second cooldown per champion).

effects_structured.raw: Damaging an enemy champion with a basic attack or ability deals 125 (+15% AP) bonus magic damage.
Triggering Soulrend grants 40% bonus movement speed for 1.5 seconds (duration extends on subsequent triggers).

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Economy representation note: Tier-1 datasets expose distributed-item gold fields (total 1000 / sell 400); these values are retained for reconciliation while acquisition remains Prismatic Item Anvil/mode-scoped rather than standard shop purchase.

Execution-semantics review: Soulrend is triggered by either basic attack damage or ability damage against champions, applies per-target cooldown gating, and refreshes movement-speed duration on subsequent champion triggers.
Mode-availability note: Night Harvester is a distributed/prismatic Arena item obtained via Prismatic Item Anvils when Arena is active.

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.name: CommunityDragon items dataset
sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror
local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring

sources.name: League of Legends Wiki - Night Harvester
sources.used_for: page-level verification of Soulrend trigger set, damage/movement values, per-target cooldown behavior, Arena exclusivity, and displayed cost/sell fields
